news.title:
Infomerics Ratings downgraded Som Distilleries due to license suspension.
The Excise Department's action has impacted the company's operations.
news.summary:
Infomerics Ratings downgraded Som Distilleries due to license suspension.
The Excise Department's action has impacted the company's operations.

news.title:
Som Distilleries' long-term bank rating downgraded to BBB from A by Infomerics.
Short-term rating remains A2; subsidiary Woodpecker's ratings also downgraded similarly.
news.summary:
Som Distilleries' long-term bank rating downgraded to BBB from A by Infomerics.
Short-term rating remains A2; subsidiary Woodpecker's ratings also downgraded similarly.

news.title:
Som Distilleries' license suspended since Feb 5, 2026; no resolution yet.
Single Bench rejected license validation; Double Bench allowed tender bids, final order awaited.
news.summary:
Som Distilleries' license suspended since Feb 5, 2026; no resolution yet.
Single Bench rejected license validation; Double Bench allowed tender bids, final order awaited.

news.title:
Som Distilleries & Breweries Ltd hit a 52-week low of Rs 69.11 on Mar 24, 2026.
The stock has declined nearly 46% YoY despite some operational growth.
news.summary:
Som Distilleries & Breweries Ltd hit a 52-week low of Rs 69.11 on Mar 24, 2026.
The stock has declined nearly 46% YoY despite some operational growth.

news.title:
Som Distilleries Q3 FY26 results show IMFL volume growth of 46%.
Rs. 600 cr brewery project planned; premium whiskey Mahavat launched.
news.summary:
Som Distilleries Q3 FY26 results show IMFL volume growth of 46%.
Rs. 600 cr brewery project planned; premium whiskey Mahavat launched.

news.title:
Som Distilleries Breweries Q3 profit fell to 55M vs 215M YoY.
Q3 revenue declined to 4.8B rupees from 5.6B rupees YoY.
news.summary:
Som Distilleries Breweries Q3 profit fell to 55M vs 215M YoY.
Q3 revenue declined to 4.8B rupees from 5.6B rupees YoY.

news.title:
Som Distilleries & Breweries saw a 49% sequential drop in net sales.
Operating margins improved, but concerns persist over capital efficiency and market position.
news.summary:
Som Distilleries & Breweries saw a 49% sequential drop in net sales.
Operating margins improved, but concerns persist over capital efficiency and market position.

news.title:
Som Distilleries & Breweries reschedules Q3 FY2025-26 earnings call to Feb 12, 2026 at 11:30 AM IST.
The management team will discuss financial results, followed by a Q&A session.
news.summary:
Som Distilleries & Breweries reschedules Q3 FY2025-26 earnings call to Feb 12, 2026 at 11:30 AM IST.
The management team will discuss financial results, followed by a Q&A session.

news.title:
Som Distilleries & Breweries confirms manufacturing license suspension by excise authorities.
The company assures no impact on its financial health or cash flow.
news.summary:
Som Distilleries & Breweries confirms manufacturing license suspension by excise authorities.
The company assures no impact on its financial health or cash flow.

news.title:
Madhya Pradesh Excise Dept. suspended Som Distilleries' plant license over a 2012 case.
The case is under appeal, with High Court staying judgment; company expects swift resolution.
news.summary:
Madhya Pradesh Excise Dept. suspended Som Distilleries' plant license over a 2012 case.
The case is under appeal, with High Court staying judgment; company expects swift resolution.

news.title:
Som Distilleries' Raisen factory license suspended by MP Excise Dept. due to a 2012 case.
Case involves former individuals, now under appeal; operations temporarily halted, legal recourse underway.
news.summary:
Som Distilleries' Raisen factory license suspended by MP Excise Dept. due to a 2012 case.
Case involves former individuals, now under appeal; operations temporarily halted, legal recourse underway.

news.title:
Som Distilleries & Breweries to hold board meeting on Feb 10, 2026, to approve unaudited Q3 FY26 results.
Trading window for equity shares remains closed from Jan 1 to Feb 12, 2026, per SEBI rules.
news.summary:
Som Distilleries & Breweries to hold board meeting on Feb 10, 2026, to approve unaudited Q3 FY26 results.
Trading window for equity shares remains closed from Jan 1 to Feb 12, 2026, per SEBI rules.

news.title:
Som Distilleries & Breweries Ltd held its EOGM on Dec 12, 2025 via video conferencing.
Shareholders approved loans, guarantees, and material related party transactions with WGNPL.
news.summary:
Som Distilleries & Breweries Ltd held its EOGM on Dec 12, 2025 via video conferencing.
Shareholders approved loans, guarantees, and material related party transactions with WGNPL.

news.title:
Som Distilleries & Breweries to evaluate a rights issue worth ₹499.9M.
The capital raise aims to support future growth initiatives.
news.summary:
Som Distilleries & Breweries to evaluate a rights issue worth ₹499.9M.
The capital raise aims to support future growth initiatives.

news.title:
Som Distilleries & Breweries sets Dec 5, 2025 as cut-off for e-voting ahead of EGM on Dec 12.
EGM to be held via video conferencing, as per SEBI regulations and Companies Act provisions.
news.summary:
Som Distilleries & Breweries sets Dec 5, 2025 as cut-off for e-voting ahead of EGM on Dec 12.
EGM to be held via video conferencing, as per SEBI regulations and Companies Act provisions.

news.title:
Som Distilleries targets 10M case capacity by FY27.
Company aims for 15% IMFL revenue growth by FY27.
news.summary:
Som Distilleries targets 10M case capacity by FY27.
Company aims for 15% IMFL revenue growth by FY27.

news.title:
SDBL acquires Woodpecker Greenagri Nutrients, making it a wholly owned subsidiary.
This move enhances SDBL's brewery presence and product portfolio in UP and northern India.
news.summary:
SDBL acquires Woodpecker Greenagri Nutrients, making it a wholly owned subsidiary.
This move enhances SDBL's brewery presence and product portfolio in UP and northern India.

news.title:
Som Distilleries reported Q2 FY26 results; IMFL portfolio grew 65% driven by brand strength.
Launched Mahavat whisky in Delhi, UP; Rs. 600 cr brewery-distillery project underway in UP.
news.summary:
Som Distilleries reported Q2 FY26 results; IMFL portfolio grew 65% driven by brand strength.
Launched Mahavat whisky in Delhi, UP; Rs. 600 cr brewery-distillery project underway in UP.

news.title:
Som Distilleries & Breweries Ltd announces an EOGM on Dec 12, 2025, at 12:30 PM via VC/OAVM. Key agenda includes approval of loans and corporate guarantees.
Loan and guarantees to related party WGNPL capped at Rs. 570 crore. Material related party transactions up to Rs. 625 crore for FY 2025-2028 also to be approved.
news.summary:
Som Distilleries & Breweries Ltd announces an EOGM on Dec 12, 2025, at 12:30 PM via VC/OAVM. Key agenda includes approval of loans and corporate guarantees.
Loan and guarantees to related party WGNPL capped at Rs. 570 crore. Material related party transactions up to Rs. 625 crore for FY 2025-2028 also to be approved.

news.title:
Som Distilleries reported Q2 net profit of 195M, up from 187M YoY.
Revenue fell to 4.76B from 5.73B YoY; EBITDA rose to 401M with 8.4% margin.
news.summary:
Som Distilleries reported Q2 net profit of 195M, up from 187M YoY.
Revenue fell to 4.76B from 5.73B YoY; EBITDA rose to 401M with 8.4% margin.
